name: French Quarter Catfish
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the catfish fillets with salt and pepper.
2. In a large skillet, heat the white wine over medium-high heat until it begins to simmer.
3. Add the vegetable oil and thyme leaves to the skillet, stirring to combine.
4. Reduce the heat to medium and add the butter or margarine mixture, stirring constantly until melted.
5. Sprinkle paprika over the catfish fillets and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
6. Turn off the heat and serve immediately with your choice of sides.
